entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Services generated by ecosystems around the world

entities.name: TRADE-OFFS
entities.description: Conflicts or balances in the provision of ecosystem services

entities.name: GOVERNANCE
entities.description: The management of interdependent action situations to handle trade-offs

entities.name: ACTION SITUATIONS
entities.description: Contexts of interdependent action involving beneficiaries and actors

entities.name: ENHANCING ACTION SITUATIONS
entities.description: Situations where beneficiaries create, maintain, or improve ecosystem services

entities.name: APPROPRIATION ACTION SITUATIONS
entities.description: Situations where actors subtract from the flow of ecosystem services

entities.name: ESS GOVERNANCE TYPES
entities.description: Specific types of governance linked to the classification of ecosystem services

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE ECOSYSTEM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The long-term maintenance and management of ecosystems

entities.name: FOREST
entities.description: Biological systems used as cases for the study

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Geographic region where forest cases were studied

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Geographic region where forest cases were studied

entities.name: LATIN AMERICA
entities.description: Geographic region where forest cases were studied

entities.name: PUBLIC GOODS
entities.description: Ecosystem services that are non-excludable and non-rivalrous

entities.name: COMMON POOL RESOURCES
entities.description: Ecosystem services that are non-excludable but rivalrous

entities.name: PRIVATE GOODS
entities.description: Ecosystem services that are excludable and rivalrous

entities.name: INCENTIVE CONSTELLATIONS
entities.description: Factors influencing the behavior of actors in action situations

entities.name: INSTITUTIONS
entities.description: Rules or organizations that fit different ecosystem services to ensure success or failure
